hero.description: AutoApply AI discovers relevant jobs, scores your compatibility, and generates ATS-optimized resumes and cover letters — all tailored to each specific role.
hero.noCreditCard: No credit card required. 3 free tailored documents per month.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps from upload to application-ready documents.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Upload your master CV (PDF, DOCX, or paste text). We extract and structure your experience.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Tell us your target roles, locations, salary range, and remote preferences. We search every 4 hours.
howItWorks.step3Desc: For each matching job, get a tailored CV and cover letter — ATS-optimized, zero fabrication.

features.title: Built for Serious Job Seekers
features.subtitle: Every feature designed to maximize your chances while keeping your data safe.
features.smartDiscoveryDesc: Aggregates listings from Adzuna, The Muse, Remotive, and more — all from official APIs. No scraping, no ToS violations.
features.aiScoringDesc: Each job is scored 0-100 against your profile based on skills match (40%), experience (25%), education (15%), and domain relevance (20%).
features.atsDocumentsDesc: Tailored resume and cover letter per job, optimized for Applicant Tracking Systems. Keywords injected naturally from your real experience.
features.automatedPipelineDesc: Set preferences once. Every 4 hours, new matching jobs are discovered and documents prepared automatically for your review.
features.privacyFirstDesc: GDPR-compliant. No credential storage. No automated logins. Your data stays yours with one-click export and deletion.
features.antiHallucinationDesc: Zero tolerance for fabricated content. AI only reorders, rephrases, and emphasizes what's already in your CV. Nothing invented.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready to supercharge your job search.
pricing.creditPackDesc: Need more credits? Get a Credit Pack — 10 additional documents for $19 (one-time).

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Job Search?
cta.subtitle: Join job seekers who are landing interviews faster with AI-tailored applications.

blog.title: Blog
blog.description: Tips, guides, and insights on AI-powered job searching, CV optimization, and career growth.
blog.noPosts: No blog posts available yet. Check back soon!
blog.ctaTitle: Ready to land your dream job?
blog.ctaDescription: Let AutoApply AI tailor your CV and cover letter for every application.

roadmap.title: Product Roadmap
roadmap.description: See what we've built, what we're working on, and what's coming next.
roadmap.suggestDesc: We'd love to hear your ideas. Let us know what would make AutoApply AI even better for your job search.
roadmap.builtInPublicDesc: See what we're building and what's coming next.
roadmap.item_ai_cv_desc: Tailored resume for every job, ATS-optimized with your real experience.
roadmap.item_cover_letter_desc: Personalized cover letter per job, matching your profile to the role.
roadmap.item_job_apis_desc: Adzuna, The Muse, Remotive, Arbeitnow, JSearch, Jooble, Reed.
roadmap.item_kanban_desc: Drag-and-drop application management across all stages.
roadmap.item_languages_desc: Full support for English, French, German, Spanish, Italian.
roadmap.item_gdpr_desc: Data export and one-click account deletion.
roadmap.item_anti_hallucination_desc: Zero fabricated content — only your real experience is used.
roadmap.item_pipeline_desc: New matching jobs discovered every 4 hours automatically.
roadmap.item_mobile_desc: Native iOS and Android app for managing your job search on the go.
roadmap.item_notifications_desc: Instant alerts when new matching jobs are found.
roadmap.item_analytics_desc: Track your application success rates and optimize your strategy.
roadmap.item_chrome_desc: 1-click tailor your CV from any job listing page.
roadmap.item_interview_desc: Practice questions generated from the actual job description.
roadmap.item_linkedin_desc: Paste any LinkedIn job URL to instantly tailor your documents.
roadmap.item_alerts_desc: Custom notification frequency and advanced filters.
roadmap.item_tone_desc: Choose between formal, casual, or creative writing styles.
roadmap.item_teams_desc: Multi-user accounts for recruiters and career coaches.
roadmap.item_salary_desc: AI-powered scripts and strategies for salary discussions.
roadmap.item_mock_desc: Video-based interview practice with AI feedback.
roadmap.item_skills_desc: Identify missing skills and get course recommendations.

error.title: Something went wrong

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configure your job preferences and automation settings.

messages.paymentSyncing: Payment successful. Syncing your account status...
messages.paymentSyncInProgress: Payment successful. Sync is still in progress. Refresh again in a few seconds.

jobPreferences.title: Job Preferences
jobPreferences.description: Define what jobs you're looking for. The AI will use these to filter and score job listings.

targetJobTitles.label: Target Job Titles
targetJobTitles.placeholder: e.g. Frontend Engineer, Full Stack Developer, React Developer
targetJobTitles.hint: Comma-separated list of desired job titles

minimumSalary.label: Minimum Salary (Annual)
minimumSalary.hint: Jobs below this annual salary will be filtered out

automation.title: Automation
automation.description: Enable automated job discovery. When on, the system checks for new matching jobs every 4 hours.

dataManagement.title: Data Management
dataManagement.description: GDPR-compliant data controls. You have full control over your data.

export.title: Export My Data
export.description: Download all your data in JSON format

delete.title: Delete Account
delete.description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data
delete.confirmHint: Click again to confirm permanent deletion

dashboardPage.title: Dashboard
dashboardPage.description: Track your applications and manage tailored documents.

profilePage.title: Profile & CV
profilePage.description: Upload your master CV and manage your structured profile. This is the source of truth for all AI-generated documents.

uploadCard.title: Upload CV
uploadCard.description: Upload your master CV as a text file or paste as text. AI will parse it into structured sections.
uploadCard.dropzoneTitle: Drop your CV here or click to upload

pasteCard.title: Paste CV Text
pasteCard.description: Alternatively, paste your CV content directly as plain text.
pasteCard.placeholder: Paste your complete CV text here...

structuredCard.title: Structured Profile
structuredCard.description: Review and edit the AI-parsed sections of your CV. This structured data powers compatibility scoring and tailoring.

cvPhoto.title: CV Photo
cvPhoto.description: Standard for Swiss and European CVs. Your photo will appear on tailored CVs.

jobsPage.title: Job Feed
jobsPage.description: Browse discovered jobs sorted by compatibility score.

pasteDialog.title: Paste Job Description
pasteDialog.description: Paste a job description and we'll tailor your CV to it.
pasteDialog.jobDescription: Paste the full job description here...

empty.title: No jobs discovered yet
empty.description: Set up your preferences in Settings, or paste a job to get started.

metadata.title: Contact Us — AutoApply AI
metadata.description: Contact AutoApply AI support for onboarding, billing, and product questions.

header.title: Contact Us
header.subtitle: Have questions, feedback, or need support? We'd love to hear from you.
header.sla: Support usually replies within one business day. Messages are used only for support and product follow-up.

success.title: Message Sent
success.description: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 24-48 hours.

form.title: Send us a message
form.description: Fill out the form below and we'll respond as soon as possible.
form.privacyNote: No marketing spam. You can request deletion of this conversation at any time.

errors.completeVerification: Please complete the verification challenge before submitting.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

errors.uploadFailedWithStatus: Upload failed ({status}). Please try again or paste your CV text instead.

errors.saveCvTextFailed: Failed to save CV text. Please try again.
errors.savePreferencesFailed: Failed to save preferences. Please try again.
errors.saveTimeout: Save timed out — please check your connection and try again.
errors.network: Network error — please check your connection and try again.

welcome.title: Welcome to AutoApply AI
welcome.description: Let's set up your profile in 2 quick steps so the AI can start matching and tailoring documents for you.

cv.title: Step 1: Upload Your CV
cv.description: Upload your master CV. The AI will use it as the source of truth — it never fabricates information.

dropzone.title: Drop your CV here or click to upload
dropzone.subtitle: PDF, DOCX, or TXT (max 5MB)

preferences.title: Step 2: Job Preferences
preferences.description: Tell us what you're looking for so we can find the best matches.

done.title: You're All Set!
done.description: Your profile is ready. The AI will now match jobs to your background and generate tailored documents.

recovery.description: Authentication could not initialize. This is usually caused by blocked cookies, strict privacy settings, ad blockers, or VPN/DNS filters blocking secure auth requests.

hints.cookies_disabled: Cookies are disabled in this browser.
hints.storage_blocked: This browser is blocking local storage/cookies required for secure auth.
hints.brave_shields: Brave Shields may block required secure authentication requests.
hints.privacy_blocking: Browser privacy settings are blocking required authentication storage.

steps.disableStrictTracking: Disable strict tracking protection for this site and retry.
steps.tryAnotherBrowser: If still blocked, try another browser or non-private tab.

footer.tagline: AI-powered career assistant. ATS-optimized, zero fabrication.
footer.officialApis: All job data sourced from official APIs only. No scraping.
